title: SAP S4 FICO Consultant
description:
PURPOSE AND SCOPE:

The Applications (SAP) team within Group Digital is tasked with building and maintaining the ERP Technology backbone to accelerate business growth and enable incubation of new business areas rapidly. The SAP Consultant will be the subject matter expert of the SAP S4HANA functional area and responsible for delivering S4HANA solutions in accordance to the business needs.


KEY ROLES AND RESPONSIBILITIES:

SAP Application Expertise:

• Subject matter expert in SAP S4HANA FICO area with in-depth knowledge of best practices and technological trends.

• Develop fit for purpose solutions that align with business operation and enterprise architecture.

Project/Solution Delivery

• Responsible for delivering projects and enhancements of SAP S4HANA systems in alignment with the global roadmap and template.

• Liaise with Business Owners to identify business needs.

• Conduct Requirement Gathering Workshop; perform Fit-Gap Analysis and Solution Design; prepare Business Blueprint and Functional Specs; review Technical Specs, Configuration Document, RICEF List, Authorization Matrix, Test Scenarios and UAT Scripts, End user training manuals.

• Perform Data Migration from legacy systems to SAP.

• Ensure customer/business user adoption through change management and user training.

• Ensure smooth transition of newly implemented SAP applications to Application Maintenance and Support (AMS) team for their day-to-day support.

• Review business requirement specifications and feasibility of possible solutions provided by AMS vendors.

• Identify and resolve systems issues proactively.

SAP Technical Ownership and Governance

• Review and update of the Global Template; manage localization or deviation requests to the Global Template.

• Comply with SAP application policies, procedures and guidelines.

• Identify, assess, and mitigate the business impacts of SAP system-related risks; participate in patch and business continuity exercise to ensure compliance to the company risk and security framework

QUALIFICATIONS & EXPERIENCE

QUALIFICATION:

• Degree in Computer Science/Information Technology or related discipline


EXPERIENCE:

• At least 8 years of strong SAP S4HANA FICO background, preferably with international technology companies or end user MNC in Utilities / Energy / Power Gen or related industries, in a similar capacity

• FICO Lead in at least 3 full cycles SAP implementation projects


TECHNICAL SKILLS:

• Hands-on experience required in S4HANA functions, including configuration or development in the following areas:

o S4HANA Finance and Controlling (FICO)

o Funds Management

o ABAP

o Roles and Security

o Integration with other SAP modules systems

• Good to have technical know-how and experience in S4HANA functions such as (but not limited to):

o Financial Consolidation

o Fiori


PREFERRED SKILLS & CHARACTERISTICS:

• Analytical, self-driven, and proactive in keeping up with new technologies and continuously developing technical skills

• Collaborative team player who can contribute effectively in a team environment

• Capable of working independently and taking ownership of assignments

• Project management and vendor management experience preferred

• Strong time management skills with the ability to effectively prioritize tasks

• Excellent attention to detail and focus on completing tasks accurately and on time

• Able to work well under pressure and meet deadlines

• Flexibility to support non-SAP system requirements as needed

• Proficient in SAP technologies with relevant experience.

• Willingness to travel as required for the role

postedCompany.description:
Company Overview

If you’re seeking for employment or employees, you’re at the right place.Welcome to Flintex Consulting, a leading Recruitment Agency in Singapore.


We Match                                            We Guide                                            We Place


We specialize in Technology, BFSI, Human Resource & Administration, Engineering & Manufacturing, Sales & Marketing,Finance & Accounting sectors.We cater to the needs of a) individual job candidates and b) companies seeking for the right employees to drive their business.


We have been able to construe and bridge the needs and demands of our individual and corporate clients. Our wide industry expertise and select client base enable us to foster fruitful careers rather than short-term jobs and placements.Our advanced placement platform is designed to match employee skill sets with current vacancies with perfect accuracy. We utilize an efficient, systematic and ultra-precise recruitment method that surpasses industry standards.


Flintex Consulting has been successful in collaborating multiple leading employers, vendors and clients. We also offer valuable insight to candidates and companies to maximize their recruitment efforts. Candidates are mentored towards finding the best-fit jobs to help build successful careers.We cover all levels of placement, from entry level professionals to mid-level and CEO level posts.We promise to provide the best suited jobs through our research-based methodologies merged with our top qualified personnel.


Flintex Consulting promises to grow your career the right way. Whether you are a client or a candidate, we have a streamlined platform to match your needs efficiently. With professional, efficient, and timely services, leave it to us when it comes to your Job-Related needs.We take pride in collaborating with leading employers, vendors, and clients. This helps us provide you with extensive job postings across all Major Industries. Additionally, we offer valuable insights and other personalized services designed to maximize productivity and results when it comes to job search.

Why Join Us?

Our Mission

Our Vision

To always conduct ourselves in a manner that reflects our passion and commitment to delivering a positive outcome for all parties involved.

To appreciate the responsibility that we assume in assisting people to make important recruitment decisions that can have a significant impact on their lives.Undertake our roles with a sense of dignity, optimism, pride and gratitude.


Our Core Values

Integrity, Quality, Professionalism, Teamwork, Commitment and Accountability


Specialties:

Recruitments, Staff Augmentation, Contract Staffing, Salary Advisory, Temporary Hiring, Executive Search, Project based Search, RPO, Payroll Services, Work Pass Application, Leadership Hiring, and Trainings
